title: Cannot pass memories in as module ports
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

try to synthesize the following code:

```
module proc_reg_wr_mux(
    input clk, rst,
    input [4:0] reg_sel[num_ports],
    input [31:0] data[num_ports],
    input req [num_ports],
    output reg ack [num_ports],
);
    parameter num_ports = 3;
endmodule
```

## Expected behavior

Synthesize ok. (eg simulators verilator and iverilog both accept this syntax.)

Why we might want to use this syntax? e.g. https://electronics.stackexchange.com/a/190809/307376

## Actual behavior

yosys crashes with

```
src/proc_reg_wr_mux.sv:3: ERROR: syntax error, unexpected '[', expecting ',' or '=' or ')'
```
code_blocks: src/proc_reg_wr_mux.sv:3: ERROR: syntax error, unexpected '[', expecting ',' or '=' or ')'
